narrative: US-Iran tensions fuel an energy shock that revives Fed rate hike bets, driving gold lower -1.80% near $3,979 and lifting the dollar. DXY firms +0.24% while equities slide -0.51% and VIX rises 16.7. USD/JPY holds at 162.366, supported by a +275bp OIS carry advantage, though options show a moderate put skew with USD/JPY 25d RR at -1.37. Watch Fed Vice Chair Jefferson's speech tomorrow for policy guidance.
